steps.title: Identify the subject and determine its number
steps.content: The subject is the country's name — a singular noun phrase (one country, one name). The verb must agree with a singular subject.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'are': Plural verb — does not agree with the singular subject the country's name. ✗
  • Choice B — 'have been': Plural verb — does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
  • Choice C — 'are being': Plural verb — does not agree with the singular subject. ✗
  • Choice D — 'is': Singular verb — agrees correctly with the country's name. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
